---

## Summary

AI Systems Developer with 3+ years of experience building production-grade LLM integrations and agentic workflows that solve real business problems. Works across the full stack — from designing multi-agent architectures and RAG pipelines to deploying them on AWS, Azure, and GCP. Systems have reduced resolution times by 80%, cut cloud costs by 30%, and shipped to production at scale. Hackathon-tested under pressure — 1st Runner-Up at Deriv AI Hackathon 2026 (366 teams). Based in UAE and open to opportunities worldwide.

---

## Work Experience

### Freelance Developer — FreelanceDev (Remote)
**Period:** Mar 2026 → Present
**Stack:** FastAPI, Python, React, Next.js, Azure Copilot, Google Document AI

- Built WhatsApp AI pipeline: invoice/bill/bank statement upload → Google Document AI → accounting system with AI service, core accounting service, and React frontend
- Delivered Azure Copilot chatbot for product customization-based price prediction
- Built Policy Tracker: automated govt API parsing with real-time compliance checking against company documents
- Delivered dental clinic website in Next.js

---

### Associate Software Engineer — Quanhack (UAE)
**Period:** Jun 2024 → Mar 2026
**Stack:** Python, LangChain, GPT-4, Gemini, Ollama, Pinecone, AWS, Azure, Docker, GitHub Actions, Stable Diffusion, ElevenLabs

- Reduced ticket resolution time by 80% via multi-agent AI platform (Gemini + Ollama hybrid inference)
- Cut cloud costs by 30% through hybrid inference — Ollama local LLMs + Gemini cloud
- Built medical research RAG system (Pinecone + GPT-4 + ReAct Agents); cut latency from 45–60s to 10–20s
- Built AI movie generation pipeline (Stable Diffusion + ElevenLabs + Gemini)
- Developed RAG system for factory hardware user manuals (Milvus + Gemini + ReAct Agents)
- Led sprint planning, stakeholder discussions, and UI/UX coordination
- Deployed on AWS, Azure, and Hostinger via Docker + GitHub Actions

---

### Software Engineer Intern — Quanhack (UAE)
**Period:** Dec 2023 → Jun 2024
**Stack:** Python, FastAPI, AWS Athena, NLP

- Architected end-to-end backend AI automation workflows
- Built NLP pipeline: AWS Athena SQL generation with data masking
- Designed modular microservice architectures across multi-cloud environments

**Period:** Sep 2023 → Dec 2023
**Stack:** Python, ML, Feature Engineering

- Processed 30–40 GB datasets, achieving 2× faster ML convergence
- Built ML preprocessing and feature engineering pipelines
- Integrated models into mobile applications for field deployment

---

## Projects

### SentinelBot — 🏆 Deriv AI Hackathon 2026 (366 Teams)
**Category:** Hackathon | **Stack:** Python, LangGraph, Playwright, FastAPI, Slack API, React, Supabase
**GitHub:** https://github.com/R1han/Sentinel-Bot

Full-stack platform for managing automated QA runs. LangGraph agents autonomously browse and validate production flows, file GitHub issues on failures, and assign Slack owners — eliminating manual QA overhead.
**Impact:** 1st Runner-Up among 366 teams. Reduced manual QA effort significantly.

---

### Ticket Resolution Platform — Enterprise (Quanhack)
**Category:** Work | **Stack:** Python, FastAPI, LangChain, Gemini, Ollama, AWS, Docker

Production enterprise platform using multi-agent pipelines to classify, route, and resolve support tickets. Hybrid inference strategy combining Ollama (local LLMs) and Gemini (cloud) cut cloud costs by 30%.
**Impact:** ↓80% resolution time · ↓30% cloud costs · hybrid local+cloud inference

---

### Medical Research RAG System — RAG / Healthcare (Quanhack)
**Category:** Work | **Stack:** Python, LangChain, GPT-4, Pinecone, ReAct Agents, FastAPI

Production RAG system indexing medical research papers in Pinecone. ReAct agents handle multi-step reasoning over retrieved context. Pipeline tuning reduced end-to-end GPT-4 latency from 45–60s down to 10–20s.
**Impact:** GPT-4 latency 45–60s → 10–20s · production RAG over medical literature.

---

### Hardware User Manual RAG — Industrial (Quanhack)
**Category:** Work | **Stack:** Python, LangChain, Gemini, Milvus, ReAct Agents, FastAPI

Production RAG system enabling engineers to query factory hardware user manuals and deployment documentation through natural language. ReAct agents reason over Milvus-indexed documentation chunks using Gemini as the backbone LLM.
**Impact:** Eliminated manual doc searches for field engineers · deployed at Quanhack.

---

### AI Movie Generation Pipeline — Generative (Quanhack)
**Category:** Work | **Stack:** Python, Stable Diffusion, ElevenLabs, Gemini, FastAPI

Orchestrated pipeline combining Stable Diffusion for frames, ElevenLabs for voiceover synthesis, and Gemini for script generation — producing coherent short-form video content fully autonomously.
**Impact:** Full generative pipeline shipped to production at Quanhack.

---

### WhatsApp AI Accounting System — FinTech (Freelance)
**Category:** Freelance | **Stack:** FastAPI, Python, React, Google Document AI, WhatsApp API

Invoice, bill, and bank statement photos sent via WhatsApp flow through Google Document AI parsing into an accounting backend. Includes core accounting service, AI extraction service, and React frontend.
**Impact:** Fully automated document-to-ledger pipeline for a real business client.

---

### Human Investment Judgement — Multi-Agent FinTech
**Category:** Personal | **Stack:** Python, LangGraph, GPT-4, CrewAI, FastAPI
**GitHub:** https://github.com/R1han/Human-Investment-Judgement

A multi-agent architecture where specialized agents (Analyst, Devil's Advocate, Synthesizer) debate investment theses and produce explainable, human-aligned verdicts on stocks and assets.
**Impact:** Explainable AI decisions with traceable reasoning chains.

---

### ExperiMentor — EdTech Simulation
**Category:** Personal | **Stack:** React, Python, FastAPI, LangChain, GPT-4
**GitHub:** https://github.com/R1han/ExperiMentor

Interactive web platform enabling students to run physics and chemistry experiments in a virtual lab. An AI chatbot provides real-time guidance, explains concepts, and adapts difficulty.
**Impact:** Interactive STEM simulation tool with AI tutoring layer.

---

### Drone Crowd Monitor — B.Tech Thesis (Computer Vision)
**Category:** Academic | **Stack:** Python, OpenCV, YOLO, TensorFlow, Flask

Computer vision pipeline processing aerial drone video to detect, count, and map crowd density in real time. Achieved 50% faster density analysis over baseline methods.
**Impact:** 50% faster density analysis · B.Tech thesis project.
